subject: [PATCH 03/13] fs/proc: use softleaf_has_pfn() in pagemap PMD walker

2026-04-27.patch_summary: This patch fixes a bug in the pagemap PMD walker by adding a check to ensure that only non-present PMDs that encode a PFN are processed. The existing code assumed all non-present PMDs were migration entries, which would crash on newer PMD types. The fix uses the softleaf_has_pfn() function to guard the page lookup, matching how non-present PTEs are handled.
